title: FoodieHub - Order from your favourite food truck
description:
Hello, everyone!

FoodieHub is an app that brings together all of the city's food trucks on one platform. Users may order their favorite food from any of their favorite food trucks and pick it up whenever convenient for them.

Let me know what you guys think!

blocks.html:
Overview

Hello, everyone!

FoodieHub is an app that brings together all of the city's food trucks on one platform. Users may order their favorite food from any of their favorite food trucks and pick it up whenever convenient for them.

Let me know what you guys think!
